consent.title: I confirm that I have read and accept the notice about the license plate.
consent.message:
By registering your vehicle, you consent that the license plate may be visible to other users solely for the purpose of identifying the car leaving a parking spot and facilitating vehicle selection in case you have several registered.

The license plate will not be associated with other personal data and will not be used for purposes other than those described.

questions.a: ParKeando is a free collaborative platform that helps you find parking more easily, connecting drivers who are leaving a space with those who are looking for one.
Users who are about to leave a parking space indicate it in the app, and those looking to park can see these locations in real time. It's a collaborative community where we all help each other.
We currently operate in major cities in Spain. We are constantly expanding to reach more locations.

questions.q: How do I indicate that I'm leaving my spot?
questions.a: Simply tap the 'Release Spot' button in the app and confirm your location. Other users will be able to see your available space on the map.

questions.q: How do I find available spaces?
questions.a: Open the app and you'll see a map with all the spots that other users are about to leave. The colors indicate when they will be available.
Yes, ParKeando is completely free. We believe in the power of collaboration between drivers to make parking easier.

questions.q: What does the points system mean?
questions.a: You earn points every time you help other users by indicating that you're leaving your spot. It's our way of thanking you for your collaboration with the community!

banner.title: Cookies
